_meta.purpose: F2 Tutor Chain Potency whitelist — cards whose activation unlocks deterministic deck-to-hand/field plays. Step 1 S1.3 seed focused on Mitsurugi + Ryzeal fixtures; expand to cover more archetypes as fixture suite grows (step 2).
_meta._notes: Inspection-seeded. Tuning deferred to step 3. Exclude D/D cards already scored by Phase 2.3 V1 (DARK_CONTRACT_IDS + Doom Queen 20715411) to avoid double-counting per ADR-S1-1 R6.
